response.justification: Staff-level engineer with minimal AI exposure (two months at current role) and no demonstrated AI products or strategic advising experience. While technically skilled with strong engineering fundamentals, the candidate lacks the director-level seniority, deep AI/ML expertise, and strategic customer-advisory background the role requires. Career trajectory is primarily web and backend engineering, not AI innovation or cloud strategy leadership.
strengths: Meets 15-year experience requirement with strong engineering fundamentals across multiple stacks
Demonstrates recent interest in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling at current role
Entrepreneurial track record with GISCollective (founded 2016, open-source platform still maintained)
concerns: Current title (Staff Software Engineer) is two levels below the required director-level principal engineer seniority
AI expertise is minimal and very recent (2+ months exposure); no products, platforms, or research background in AI/ML
No experience in strategic customer advising, cloud platform strategy, or recognized AI product leadership

key_factors.factor: No demonstrated AI expertise or products
No advanced AI/ML education or strategic experience
